app.title: TomaNote
app.slogan: TomaNote: free, private & offline online notepad
app.doodle-subtitle: Open an existing note or create a new one with the
about.main-first-description: TomaNote is a simple, fast, and free notepad designed for distraction-free writing.
about.main-second-description: It runs directly in your browser with no accounts or sign-up required. All your notes are saved locally on your device, meaning you stay in full control of your data.
about.intro-third-description: It's not a complex productivity platform or a project manager. It's a clean space to think, write, and organize ideas.
about.second-first-description: Notes are stored in your browser's local storage. If you clear your browser data or hard-reload the page, your notes will be lost. We recommend exporting or backing up your notes regularly.
about.title-second-list-item4: Dark mode by default with multiple customization themes
about.third-first-description: TomaNote exists because writing should be simple, free, and accessible — no external services or subscriptions needed.
licence.main-subtitle: GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL) v3.0

licence.second-description: Users may not use the software for commercial purposes unless prior written authorization has been obtained from the developer.
licence.third-description: Direct or indirect commercialization of this software is prohibited, including but not limited to selling, leasing, sublicensing, or any other commercial use, without the express written consent of the original copyright holder. This restriction does not affect users' rights to modify, improve, or redistribute the software, provided such activities do not involve commercial use.
licence.last-description: For permissions related to commercial use, please contact the copyright holder.
terms.main-subtitle: Terms and Warnings for Notepad Use
terms.second-description1: This notepad uses your browser's LocalStorage to save data. Although the storage limit is 5 MB, we recommend avoiding large volumes of text. Browser storage is limited and may be affected by saving large amounts of data. If you reach the limit, you may lose data — please back up your notes regularly.
terms.second-description2: Data saved in this notepad is not encrypted and is stored in your browser's LocalStorage, which does not guarantee security. We recommend not storing sensitive or private information here, as it may be vulnerable to unauthorized access if others have access to your device or browser.
terms.second-description3: Make sure you are using a trusted and secure URL when accessing the notepad. Avoid accessing it from suspicious links or unsecured public networks, as you may be exposed to phishing attacks or data theft. The development team is not responsible for data loss due to improper use or insecure access.
typo.first-option-info: Select a font from the list or choose Custom to use another one.
typo.first-option-alert: Please enter a valid Google Fonts URL.
typo.first-option-sbs1-1: For a custom font, get the URL from
typo.first-option-sbs3: Font settings are saved locally in this browser and applied automatically.
typo.second-option-subtitle: Controls the text size in the editor
roadmap.title: News
roadmap.prev-desc-1: New FAB button at bottom right for creating tabs, replacing the old inline button.
roadmap.prev-desc-2: Corrected display issues in modals on small screens.
roadmap.prev-desc-3: Added automated tests for core components: tabs, themes, fonts and context menu.
roadmap.prev-desc-4: Fixed a bug where custom fonts wouldn't reset properly to the default.
roadmap.current-desc-1: New always-visible floating menu with grouped tools: content, font and tab actions.
roadmap.current-desc-2: Reorder your tabs by dragging them. Powered by SortableJS.
roadmap.current-desc-3: Choose between Base, Medium and Large text size. Saved locally per browser.
roadmap.current-desc-4: Paste any Google Fonts URL in settings and apply it instantly to your editor.
roadmap.current-desc-5: Full interface translation system. Switch between English and Spanish from settings.
roadmap.current-desc-6: Completely redesigned with dedicated tabs: About, License, Terms, News, Typography, Appearance and Language.
roadmap.next-desc-1: Write markdown and see it rendered live as you type.
roadmap.next-desc-2: Resize pasted images directly in the note up to 500px max.
roadmap.next-desc-3: Draw diagrams and flowcharts using text syntax inside your notes.
roadmap.next-desc-4: Lock your session with a temporary daily key. No password stored, full privacy.
